description: Starter frozen evaluation set for DailyNews prompt and quality regression checks.

cases.description: Two related tech stories should prefer v2-deep and produce evidence-tagged analysis.

items.title: Nvidia suppliers expand advanced packaging capacity
items.summary: Asian chip suppliers are accelerating advanced packaging investment to relieve GPU bottlenecks and support hyperscaler demand.

items.title: Cloud providers revise AI infrastructure pricing plans
items.summary: Major cloud platforms are testing longer-term GPU reservation contracts as inference demand becomes less predictable.

cases.description: Two AI stories should stay in deep mode and produce focused action items for builders.

items.title: Enterprise buyers push for smaller domain-tuned models
items.summary: Companies are prioritizing controllable fine-tuned models that reduce latency, cost, and compliance overhead.

items.title: Open-source agent tooling wins inside regulated teams
items.summary: Regulated sectors are adopting observable agent stacks when they can inspect prompts, tools, and logs end to end.

cases.description: Korean economy evening batch should trigger multi-signal mode.

items.title: Korean exporters face new freight cost pressure
items.summary: Manufacturers warn that shipping cost normalization has stalled as Red Sea rerouting persists.

items.title: Retail spending softens outside premium districts
items.summary: Mid-market consumption remains weak even as premium neighborhoods report stronger traffic.

items.title: Banks tighten SME lending reviews
items.summary: Banks are raising scrutiny on small-business borrowers tied to construction and discretionary retail.

cases.description: Global economy batch should highlight macro transmission across rates, labor, and logistics.

items.title: European manufacturers warn on delayed rate-cut payoff
items.summary: Executives say financing conditions remain tight because banks are repricing risk more slowly than central banks are guiding.

items.title: US labor cooling narrows wage gains in logistics
items.summary: Warehouse and transport hiring has cooled, softening wage growth after several quarters of labor shortages.

items.title: Shipping insurers keep war-risk premiums elevated
items.summary: Insurers say geopolitical threats continue to keep container route insurance pricing above pre-crisis norms.

cases.description: Crypto morning batch should stay in deep mode and connect exchange structure to asset flows.

items.title: Institutional desks favor basis trades over outright exposure
items.summary: Prime brokers report stronger client interest in market-neutral structures than directional spot accumulation.

items.title: Asian exchanges compete on stablecoin settlement rails
items.summary: Regional exchanges are racing to reduce withdrawal friction by expanding stablecoin settlement options.

cases.description: Global affairs evening batch should prefer multi-signal mode with geopolitical ripple effects.

items.title: Regional chip export controls widen to packaging tools
items.summary: New export controls are extending from advanced chips to adjacent packaging and inspection tools.

items.title: Alliance partners debate maritime patrol burden sharing
items.summary: Defense officials are negotiating how to split surveillance and escort responsibilities across shipping lanes.

items.title: Battery supply pacts move closer to security agreements
items.summary: Governments are tying battery-mineral access deals to broader strategic cooperation and procurement preferences.
